name: Apple Mint Chutney
recipeIngredient: 2 large lemons, outer rind pare and cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare outer rind from lemons and cut into thin strips.
2. Squeeze and strain lemons into a stainless pan.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients; bring to boil.
4. Reduce heat to low; simmer for 1 1/2 hours or until thickened.
5. Fill and seal jars according to Bath Basics.
